basic_details.job_title: DLSA Jangaon Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for DEO, Peon and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: District Legal Services Authority, Jangaon (DLSA Jangaon)
basic_details.short_information: District Legal Services Authority, Jangaon (DLSA Jangaon) DEO, Peon and More Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of DLSA Jangaon. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the DLSA Jangaon Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 34 years Age relaxation to the BC/SC/ST etc., will be given as per Rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation, 10th Class Pass, Typing speed of 40 WPM, Word Processing abilities
qualification.details: OFFICE ASSISTANT/CLERK: Graduation, Basic word processing skills and ability to operate computer, Typing speed of 40 WPM, Ability to take dictation and entering data, File maintenance and processing knowledge. RECEPTIONIST-CUM-DATA ENTRY OPERATOR: Graduation, Excellent verbal and written communication skills, Word Processing abilities, Ability to work telecommunication systems (Telephone, fax machines, switchboards etc), Proficiency with good typing speed. OFFICE PEON (MUNSHI/ATTENDANT): 10th Class Pass, Keep the premises Clean and tidy, Any work assigned by the Legal Aid Defense Counsels and Supporting Staff.

salary_details.details: OFFICE ASSISTANT/CLERK: Rs.20,000/- RECEPTIONIST-CUM-DATA ENTRY OPERATOR: Rs.15,000/- OFFICE PEON (MUNSHI/ATTENDANT): Rs.14,000/-

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for DLSA Jangaon Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DLSA Jangaon Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the DLSA Jangaon Recruitment 2026 is 16th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the authority before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the DLSA Jangaon Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced for the posts of Office Assistant, Data Entry Operator, and Peon in the DLSA Jangaon Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 34 years for all the posts. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: Qualifications vary by post. For Office Assistant, Graduation with typing skills is required. For Data Entry Operator, Graduation with good communication and typing skills is needed. For Peon, a 10th Class Pass is the minimum requirement.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for DLSA Jangaon Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for these posts?
faq.answer: The application process for DLSA Jangaon Recruitment 2026 is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the different posts?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 14,000/- for Office Peon, Rs. 15,000/- for Receptionist-cum-Data Entry Operator, and Rs. 20,000/- for Office Assistant/Clerk.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for DLSA Jangaon Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a competitive selection process. Further details will be provided in the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Which state is this government job notification for?
faq.answer: This government job notification is for the state of Telangana, specifically for the District Legal Services Authority in Jangaon.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the "Important Links" section of this article, which will direct you to the relevant sections of the official website or the PDF document.
